title: Convert YAML List of Mappings to CSV
cap_description: Convert a YAML sequence of mappings to CSV with headers derived from mapping keys
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a YAML sequence of mappings into a CSV file. Each mapping becomes one row; mapping keys become column headers. Use this when downstream processing requires tabular CSV but the data is in YAML format.

## Inputs

A YAML sequence where each element is a mapping.

## Outputs

A CSV file with headers derived from the mapping keys.

## Notes

- Mappings with missing keys produce empty cells.
- For JSON array output, use [Convert YAML List of Mappings to JSON Array of Objects](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:list;record;textable;yaml";op=convert_format;out="media:json;list;record;textable").
- For the reverse, use [Convert CSV to YAML List of Mappings](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:csv;list;record;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:list;record;textable;yaml").

args.arg_description: YAML sequence of mappings to convert

output.output_description: CSV formatted data with header row
